title: espeletia ariana
intro: Espeletia ariana, also known as "Ariana tree mallow," is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Espeletia ariana are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Espeletia ariana typically involve infusions, tinctures, and decoctions made from the leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically for skin issues.
